questions.main_text: What problem is there with Britain’s young employees?

content.text: What problem is there with Britain’s young employees?

options.text: Their desire to gain immediate access to higher-paying positions
Their knowledge basis is too limited for further development
Their failure to keep up with technological development

questions.main_text: What is the main difference between the old and new national plans of education?

content.text: What is the main difference between the old and new national plans of education?

options.text: An increase in the humanities
A decrease in mathematics
A change into computer-directed study

questions.main_text: In the study, what characteristics are women said to have?

content.text: In the study, what characteristics are women said to have?

options.text: Being interested and sociable
Being sympathetic and generous
Being sweet and beautiful

questions.main_text: What does Mary-Austin do with light in her paintings?

content.text: What does Mary-Austin do with light in her paintings?

options.text: The light comes in from the side of the scene
The light goes through the painting and is reflected
The light remains fairly vague and shadowy

questions.main_text: What is the sensational discovery?

content.text: What is the sensational discovery?

options.text: There are suns in deep space
There are black holes everywhere in space
There are new possibilities for finding life in outer space

questions.main_text: What does the study of foreign languages help to understand in computer programming?

content.text: What does the study of foreign languages help to understand in computer programming?

options.text: The differences between human and machine languages
How interconnecting parts fit together
What one should focus on when writing code

questions.main_text: What does Mary-Austin state about Facebook?

content.text: What does Mary-Austin state about Facebook?

options.text: It’s important not to spend too much time there
It’s good for socialization with the artistic community
It’s a suitable place for setting up personal meetings

questions.main_text: Overall, what did the women interviewed say about money?

content.text: Overall, what did the women interviewed say about money?

options.text: They want it to have a sense of power in society
They find it to be not quite as important as making love
They want enough so they don’t have to worry about it

questions.main_text: What is Adam D’Souza claiming?

content.text: What is Adam D’Souza claiming?

options.text: That pragmatic education is impractical
That history may well be out of fashion
That reaching every pupil is not an idle dream

questions.main_text: What was funny on the video?

content.text: What was funny on the video?

options.text: Ireland and the UK were confused
The two did not understand each other
The newsman thought Ireland was part of the US

questions.main_text: Mitä Muumipeikko teki, ja mitä yöllä tapahtui?
questions.feedback:
– Heitti (sana)kirjan hattuun. (2,5 p.)

– Sanat ryömivät ulos siitä joka puolelle taloa. (2,5 p.)

content.text: Mitä Muumipeikko teki, ja mitä yöllä tapahtui?

questions.main_text: What would the woman probably say next?

content.text: What would the woman probably say next?

options.text: Yeah, we need to take everything into account.
There is no way he could think anything else.
Yup, he’s clearly an introvert.

questions.main_text: What does Mary-Austin say about the Southern California light?

content.text: What does Mary-Austin say about the Southern California light?

options.text: It attracts people to the beach
It creates challenges for an artist
It simply causes Mary-Austin to feel good

questions.main_text: What about the ladybirds seems to disturb the man?

content.text: What about the ladybirds seems to disturb the man?

options.text: He can’t clean the kitchen
He has a general fear of insects
He has to live with them all winter

questions.main_text: What is one of her goals as an artist?

content.text: What is one of her goals as an artist?

options.text: To keep her art within the reach of ordinary workers
To concentrate on the colors in each painting
To create works which will stand the test of time

content.text: What would the woman probably say next?

options.text: Well, this seems to be what he has chosen for now.
Are you sure he’s the right person for the job?
Y’know, he’s had to work very hard to enter the college.

questions.main_text: What would the woman probably say next?

content.text: What would the woman probably say next?

options.text: Yeah, I think it’s warming back up.
Yeah, this cool spell is a bit unseasonal.
Yeah, we’ll keep having mild weather.

questions.main_text: Miksi postia ei viedä perille? (2 asiaa)
questions.feedback:
− Turvallisuussyistä. / Postimiehiä loukkaantunut. (2,5 p.)

− Koska jalkakäytävä on rikkinäinen. (2,5 p.)

content.text: Miksi postia ei viedä perille? (2 asiaa)

questions.main_text: Mitä liikennemerkkejä varastetaan eniten, ja mitä varastettiin yhtenä yönä viime viikolla?
questions.feedback:
– Nopeusrajoitukset ja stop-merkit. (2,5 p.)

− ”Älä varasta merkkiä”-merkit. (2,5 p.)

content.text: Mitä liikennemerkkejä varastetaan eniten, ja mitä varastettiin yhtenä yönä viime viikolla?

questions.main_text: Miten koulujen läheisyys vaikuttaa asunnon hintaan? (2 asiaa)
questions.feedback:
– Ala-aste nostaa hintaa kymmeniä tuhansia euroja. (2,5 p.)

– Lukio ei nosta hintaa. (2,5 p.)

content.text: Miten koulujen läheisyys vaikuttaa asunnon hintaan? (2 asiaa)

questions.main_text: Minkä virheellisen ohjeen navigaattori antoi, ja mitä siitä seurasi?
questions.feedback:
− Ohjasi puistoon/kävelytielle. (2,5 p.)

– Puita vahingoittui/tuhoutui. (2,5 p.)

content.text: Minkä virheellisen ohjeen navigaattori antoi, ja mitä siitä seurasi?

questions.main_text: What is she searching for while driving around?

content.text: What is she searching for while driving around?

options.text: New portraits she has not painted before
An excellent angle on something to paint
How nature constantly evolves

questions.main_text: What does she combine in her painting process?

content.text: What does she combine in her painting process?

options.text: Her love of nature and cities
Her feelings for certain events and places
Her youthful interest and current perceptions

questions.main_text: What does Adam D’Souza say about the current National Curriculum?

content.text: What does Adam D’Souza say about the current National Curriculum?

options.text: It has been applied too carelessly
It leaves too little room for imagination and creativity
It focuses too much on the ability to do things

questions.main_text: What would the man probably say next?

content.text: What would the man probably say next?

options.text: Give me a moment while I collect my thoughts.
Well, the manager’s been asking me too many questions
To tell the truth it’s not just one thing, it’s many.

questions.main_text: What would the man probably say next?

content.text: What would the man probably say next?

options.text: Well, that’s natural. Everyone wants something like that.
You know, it’s not every day that that sort of thing happens.
Yet, this was such a surprise!

questions.main_text: What do women wish for their children most?

content.text: What do women wish for their children most?

options.text: To get a higher position
To get further education
To get suitable work

content.text: _Answer questions 1–26 by choosing the __**best**__ alternative._

questions.main_text: What did women say about their nuclear family and those outside of it?

content.text: What did women say about their nuclear family and those outside of it?

options.text: The nuclear family was more important
Those right outside it were almost as important
There was an equality between the two

questions.main_text: What comment does Adam D’Souza make about teaching coding?

content.text: What comment does Adam D’Souza make about teaching coding?

options.text: No one will think of coding in the future
Coding will be insufficient
There are never going to be enough expert coders

questions.main_text: What would the woman probably say next?

content.text: What would the woman probably say next?

options.text: Where are we going to get that kind of money?
I’ve found a way out of this problem.
I couldn’t agree with you more.

questions.main_text: What led to Nicolas being discovered?

content.text: What led to Nicolas being discovered?

options.text: He created a diplomatic incident
He embarrassed the crown
His disguise failed him
